mapper.select:
-- 사업본부별 영업 현황 지표를 집계한다. SELECT d.department_id, d.code AS department_code, d.name AS department_name, COUNT(o.opportunity_id) FILTER (WHERE o.status NOT IN ('HOLD', 'LOST')) AS opportunity_count, COALESCE(SUM(o.project_amount) FILTER (WHERE o.status NOT IN ('HOLD', 'LOST')), 0) AS total_project_amount, COALESCE(SUM(o.project_amount) FILTER (WHERE o.status NOT IN ('HOLD', 'LOST') AND ps.probability >= 90), 0) AS confirmed_revenue_amount, COALESCE(SUM(o.project_amount) FILTER (WHERE o.status NOT IN ('HOLD', 'LOST') AND ps.probability < 90), 0) AS expected_revenue_amount, COUNT(o.opportunity_id) FILTER (WHERE o.status = 'HOLD') AS hold_count, COUNT(o.opportunity_id) FILTER (WHERE o.status = 'LOST') AS lost_count, COALESCE(SUM(o.project_amount) FILTER (WHERE o.status IN ('HOLD', 'LOST')), 0) AS hold_lost_amount FROM departments d LEFT JOIN opportunities o ON o.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN probability_stages ps ON ps.probability_stage_id = o.probability_stage_id WHERE d.is_active = TRUE
AND d.code IN
#{departmentCode}
AND 1 = 0
GROUP BY d.department_id, d.code, d.name, d.display_order ORDER BY d.display_order, d.department_id
